org.apache.dubbo.cache.support.expiring

类 ExpiringMap.ExpireThread

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.cache.support.expiring.ExpiringMap.ExpireThread
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Runnable
    封闭类:
    ExpiringMap<K,V>

    public class ExpiringMap.ExpireThread
extends Object
implements Runnable
    Background thread, periodically checking if the data is out of date
